title: Gear & Tools Back to Ores
description: Change Your Gear & Tools Back To Ores ( Using a Crafting Table )
body:
Change Gear & Tools Back to Ingots is a practical Minecraft mod that allows players to reclaim valuable materials from old or unwanted gear and tools. This mod lets you smelt down various metal items, such as armor and weapons, back into their original ingots. It's perfect for players who want to recycle their equipment, conserve resources, and reduce waste. 

![ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f095d5af458aa2b7116c926f4f1cfa77576b8a8d_0.webp)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
**What can be uncrafted:**

Helmet

Chestplate

Leggings

Boots

Spectral arrow

Arrow

Elytra

Iron trapdoor

Bundle

Bucket

Hopper

Minecard

Iron door

Totem of undying

Iron bars

Crossbow

Bow

Horse armor

Flint & steel

Hoe 

Sword

Pickaxe

Shovel

Axe

Trident

Shield

Beacon

Anvil

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d976383817adb8765aa7087ca9c71f7a7229b724.png)
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/977635454bb0cf562096786b0041f7eb45fa83c9.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
